race.comment: EXTRA ZERO (1) steps up in trip and is backing up nine days after his placing behind Cateran. Keeps the handy 2kg claim and deserves to break through. IL BELLO BEALS (2) lacked finishing dash in the same race, but he's knocking on the door. Is also running out of chances but Faithfull is a positive jockey booking and the tongue tie is on again. Draws well and has claims. DANEA ROCK (6) has been racing over middle distances in stronger Maidens. Raced at Belmont the latest and jumped favourite the two prior. It's an ask but she has some ability and this is hardly the Railway. SHE'SATROOPER (7) made good improvement at Esperance and consider.
